title: Embeddings & Similarity Search

use_cases.name: Generate Embeddings (Synchronous)
flow: Checks cache (generateFromCache) — returns cached EmbeddingsResponse if hit
On cache miss: calls EmbeddingProvider->embeddings(inputs, dimensions, model, timeout)
On FailoverableException: fires ProviderFailedOver event, tries next provider

use_cases.name: Queue Embeddings (Asynchronous)
flow: If faked: records QueuedEmbeddingsPrompt, returns FakePendingDispatch-wrapped response
Otherwise: dispatches GenerateEmbeddings job via Laravel queue

use_cases.name: Search Similar Documents
flow: AI Agent invokes SimilaritySearch tool with JSON { query: string }
SimilaritySearch::usingModel(model, column, minSimilarity, limit, ?query) configures tool via closure
handle() calls the using closure with request->string('query')
Optional custom query modifier applied if provided
Result mapped to arrays, embedding column excluded (Arr::except)
If rerank enabled: Collection->rerank(rerankBy, queryString, limit) applied
Returns formatted JSON string of ranked results, or 'No relevant results found.'

use_cases.name: Fake Embeddings for Testing
flow: Returns FakeEmbeddingGateway registered with Ai service
On generateEmbeddings(): pulls next response from queue or invokes closure
If no response defined and preventStrayEmbeddings not set: auto-generates normalized random float vector via Embeddings::fakeEmbedding(dimensions)
If preventStrayGenerations=true and no response: throws RuntimeException

key_classes.name: EmbeddingGateway
methods: generateEmbeddings(EmbeddingProvider, string, array, int, int): EmbeddingsResponse

key_classes.name: FakeEmbeddingGateway
key_classes.notes: Maintains response queue/closure; auto-generates normalized random vectors if no fake provided

key_relationships: Embeddings::fake() delegates to Ai::fakeEmbeddings() returning FakeEmbeddingGateway
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration depends_on EmbeddingProvider (resolved at generate time)
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration uses Cache for optional response caching
PendingEmbeddingsGeneration dispatches GenerateEmbeddings job for async flow
FakeEmbeddingGateway calls Embeddings::fakeEmbedding() for auto-generated vectors
SimilaritySearch implements Tool interface (used by AI agents)
SimilaritySearch.usingModel uses Eloquent whereVectorSimilarTo for vector DB query
SimilaritySearch optionally invokes Collection->rerank() for result reranking
important_notes: SimilaritySearch is in src/Tools (not PendingResponses as suggested — different from other pending classes)
Failover: PendingEmbeddingsGeneration iterates multiple providers; catches FailoverableException, fires ProviderFailedOver event
Cache key: sha256 of provider+model+dimensions+inputs; store configurable via ai.caching.embeddings.store
SimilaritySearch.rerank delegates to Collection->rerank() (custom macro, not part of this scope)
Queue flow: GenerateEmbeddings job carries PendingEmbeddingsGeneration + provider/model args
